Off Calendar Apr-14-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2020 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-27-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-31-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Ryon Nixon, Esq. 415-763-1115 of Horizons Law & Consulting Group for Plaintiff.
Sumana Wolf, Esq. 415-963-1564 of Zeilser PLLC for Plaintiff
Warren Metlitzky, Esq.; William Cooper, Esq.415-343-7100 of Conrad Melitzky for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT MARK MERAS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Taken Under Submission.***(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

**After the hearing, an order granting defendant and cross-claimant mark meras' special motion to strike slapp suit (second,third, and fourth causes of action) is signed/filed. (see scanned order for details)***

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-28-2020 Continued To Aug-31-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
